g.text: A portable, versioned format for documenting and scoring Claude
Skills — carded by its own standard.
Use to give a Claude skill a machine-readable card: identity and
provenance, triggering, measured quality, and a SkillSpector scan —
generated from the skill's own inputs and gated in CI so the card
the colour scale every metric is graded on
self-scan of the skillcard package, gated by `make check` on every
